mapper.sql: id, record_no, course_name, course_type, trainer, trainee_count, trainee_names, start_date, end_date, duration, status, exam_pass_rate, deleted, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM tbl_training_record WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_training_record ( record_no, course_name, course_type, trainer, trainee_count, trainee_names, start_date, end_date, duration, status, exam_pass_rate, deleted, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{recordNo}, #{courseName}, #{courseType}, #{trainer}, #{traineeCount}, #{traineeNames}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{duration}, #{status}, #{examPassRate}, 0, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update:
UPDATE tbl_training_record
update_time = NOW(), record_no = #{recordNo}, course_name = #{courseName}, course_type = #{courseType}, trainer = #{trainer}, trainee_count = #{traineeCount}, trainee_names = #{traineeNames}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, duration = #{duration}, status = #{status}, exam_pass_rate = #{examPassRate},
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE tbl_training_record SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT record_no FROM tbl_training_record WHERE record_no LIKE CONCAT('TR-', #{datePrefix}, '%') ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
